description:
🐣 Personalized First Easter 2026 Wooden Egg
Celebrate your baby's very first Easter with a keepsake you'll treasure forever. This Personalized First Easter 2026 Wooden Egg is custom engraved with your little one's name, creating a meaningful heirloom to remember this special milestone.

✨ Why You'll Love It:
• Custom engraved with your baby's name
• "First Easter 2026" timeless keepsake design
• Optional adorable bunny engraving styles
• Lightweight and perfect for Easter baskets
• Beautiful photo prop for baby's first Easter pictures
• A thoughtful heirloom gift for baby girls and boys

🌿 Premium Natural Wood – Each egg is crafted from natural wood, showcasing unique grain patterns and tones.
